gallery.message.yingbinmansion.title: Grand Welcome Hotel
gallery.message.yingbinmansion.desc: Grand Welcome Hotel: a mixed-use residential and commercial tower completed in 1998.
gallery.message.huanglier.title: The Huang Li'er Incident
gallery.message.huanglier.desc: Three years ago, the woman living in room 1304 was last seen on camera walking into the elevator — and never came out. The police never opened a case.
gallery.message.parallel_world.title: Parallel-World Anomaly
gallery.message.parallel_world.desc: Two years ago, a delivery rider stepped out of an elevator and found the entire building rearranged. Camera records showed he never entered that elevator. He later lost his mind.
gallery.message.live_pile.title: Live Pile Burial
gallery.message.live_pile.desc: Local lore: when construction began in 1998, seven workers died in succession. A live-pile ritual was supposedly performed — burying a teenage girl alive to anchor the foundation. Room 1304 sits directly above that spot.
gallery.message.live_suicide.title: The Livestream Suicide
gallery.message.live_suicide.desc: Last year, a streamer jumped from the window of room 1304 mid-livestream, witnessed by thousands. The next morning he woke up alive in his own bed, with no memory of it. Every copy of the video was scrubbed online within hours.
